meta.description: Compressed hunt cards for amm — one-line detection rules for bulk scanning
meta.usage: Load cards into context. For each card, grep target code for card.grep. On hit: execute card.check steps directly, use validWhen/invalidWhen/impact for rapid triage, and only read full DB entry (card.ref + card.lines) for confirmed true/likely positives.

cards.title: Pattern 1: Unchecked Overflow in FullMath Migration (HIGH)
cards.detect: Migrating Uniswap V3's FullMath from pre-0.8 Solidity to 0.8+ without `unchecked` blocks breaks intentional overflow...
check: VERIFY: Migrating Uniswap V3's FullMath from pre-0.8 Solidity to 0.8+ without unchecked blocks breaks intentional overflow...
PROVE: Solidity 0.8 reverts on intentional overflow
FALSIFY: Wrap in unchecked block for 0.8+
cards.antipattern: Solidity 0.8 reverts on intentional overflow
cards.validWhen: Migrating Uniswap V3's FullMath from pre-0.8 Solidity to 0.8+ without unchecked blocks breaks intentional overflow...

cards.title: Pattern 2: Fee Growth Underflow Not Handled (HIGH)
cards.detect: Uniswap V3's intentional underflow in fee growth calculations isn't properly handled in wrapper protocols.
check: VERIFY: Uniswap V3's intentional underflow in fee growth calculations isn't properly handled in wrapper protocols.
PROVE: Comparison instead of subtraction
FALSIFY: Use unchecked subtraction like Uniswap V3
cards.antipattern: Comparison instead of subtraction
cards.securePattern: Use unchecked subtraction like Uniswap V3
cards.validWhen: Uniswap V3's intentional underflow in fee growth calculations isn't properly handled in wrapper protocols.
cards.invalidWhen: Use unchecked subtraction like Uniswap V3

cards.title: Pattern 3: Rounding Error Amplification Breaking Pool Invariants (HIGH)
cards.detect: Rounding errors in initial LP minting can be amplified to break pool pricing invariants.
check: VERIFY: Rounding errors in initial LP minting can be amplified to break pool pricing invariants.
PROVE: Wrong rounding direction enables invariant manipulation
FALSIFY: Use ceiling rounding to ensure enough quote balance
cards.antipattern: Wrong rounding direction enables invariant manipulation
cards.securePattern: Use ceiling rounding to ensure enough quote balance
cards.validWhen: Rounding errors in initial LP minting can be amplified to break pool pricing invariants.
cards.invalidWhen: Use ceiling rounding to ensure enough quote balance

cards.title: Pattern 4: First Depositor / Inflation Attack (HIGH)
cards.detect: First depositor can inflate share price to steal from subsequent depositors.
check: VERIFY: First depositor can inflate share price to steal from subsequent depositors.
PROVE: No protection against share inflation
FALSIFY: Virtual shares and minimum liquidity lock
cards.antipattern: No protection against share inflation
cards.securePattern: Virtual shares and minimum liquidity lock
cards.validWhen: First depositor can inflate share price to steal from subsequent depositors.
cards.invalidWhen: Virtual shares and minimum liquidity lock

cards.title: Pattern 5: Counter Overflow DoS (MEDIUM)
cards.detect: Shared counter contracts can be overflowed by attackers to DoS legitimate operations.
check: VERIFY: Shared counter contracts can be overflowed by attackers to DoS legitimate operations.
PROVE: Shared counter can be overflowed by anyone
FALSIFY: Validate counter addresses, or use per-position counters
cards.antipattern: Shared counter can be overflowed by anyone
cards.securePattern: Validate counter addresses, or use per-position counters
cards.validWhen: Shared counter contracts can be overflowed by attackers to DoS legitimate operations.
cards.invalidWhen: Validate counter addresses, or use per-position counters

cards.title: Pattern 6: Withdrawal Queue Griefing DoS (HIGH)
cards.detect: Unlimited withdrawal requests enable queue flooding attacks.
check: VERIFY: Unlimited withdrawal requests enable queue flooding attacks.
PROVE: No limit on withdrawal requests
FALSIFY: Aggregate requests per user, minimum amount
cards.antipattern: No limit on withdrawal requests
cards.securePattern: Aggregate requests per user, minimum amount
cards.validWhen: Unlimited withdrawal requests enable queue flooding attacks.
cards.invalidWhen: Aggregate requests per user, minimum amount

cards.title: Pattern 7: Re-initialization Vulnerability (CRITICAL)
cards.detect: Missing access control on `initialize()` allows attackers to reconfigure critical parameters.
check: VERIFY: Missing access control on initialize() allows attackers to reconfigure critical parameters.
PROVE: No access control, no initialization guard
FALSIFY: Use initializer modifier and access control
cards.antipattern: No access control, no initialization guard
cards.securePattern: Use initializer modifier and access control
cards.validWhen: Missing access control on initialize() allows attackers to reconfigure critical parameters.
cards.invalidWhen: Use initializer modifier and access control

cards.title: Pattern 8: Inconsistent Rounding Directions (MEDIUM)
cards.detect: Using same rounding for buy and sell operations leads to value leakage.
check: VERIFY: Using same rounding for buy and sell operations leads to value leakage.
PROVE: Same rounding direction for both buy and sell
FALSIFY: Round against user (in favor of protocol)
cards.antipattern: Same rounding direction for both buy and sell
cards.securePattern: Round against user (in favor of protocol)
cards.validWhen: Using same rounding for buy and sell operations leads to value leakage.
cards.invalidWhen: Round against user (in favor of protocol)

cards.title: Pattern 9: Broken Multi-Token Pool Invariants (HIGH)
cards.detect: Applying 2-token AMM formulas to multi-token pools breaks invariants.
check: VERIFY: Applying 2-token AMM formulas to multi-token pools breaks invariants.
PROVE: 2-token formula used for 3-token pool
FALSIFY: Enforce 2-token limit for CPMM
cards.antipattern: 2-token formula used for 3-token pool
cards.validWhen: Applying 2-token AMM formulas to multi-token pools breaks invariants.

cards.title: Pattern 10: Initial LP Token Calculation Ignoring Relative Values (HIGH)
cards.detect: Calculating initial LP tokens by adding token amounts ignores relative values.
check: VERIFY: Calculating initial LP tokens by adding token amounts ignores relative values.
PROVE: Adding token amounts regardless of value
FALSIFY: Use geometric mean for initial liquidity
cards.antipattern: Adding token amounts regardless of value
cards.securePattern: Use geometric mean for initial liquidity
cards.validWhen: Calculating initial LP tokens by adding token amounts ignores relative values.
cards.invalidWhen: Use geometric mean for initial liquidity

cards.title: Secure Pattern 2: Consistent Underflow Handling
cards.detect: // SECURE: Handle Uniswap V3 style underflow correctly
check: VERIFY: // SECURE: Handle Uniswap V3 style underflow correctly
FALSIFY: Handle Uniswap V3 style underflow correctly
cards.securePattern: Handle Uniswap V3 style underflow correctly
cards.validWhen: // SECURE: Handle Uniswap V3 style underflow correctly
cards.invalidWhen: Handle Uniswap V3 style underflow correctly

cards.title: Secure Pattern 3: First Depositor Protection
cards.detect: // SECURE: Virtual shares and minimum liquidity
check: VERIFY: // SECURE: Virtual shares and minimum liquidity
FALSIFY: Virtual shares and minimum liquidity
cards.validWhen: // SECURE: Virtual shares and minimum liquidity

cards.title: Secure Pattern 4: Bounded Queue with Rate Limiting
cards.detect: // SECURE: Rate-limited withdrawal queue
check: VERIFY: // SECURE: Rate-limited withdrawal queue
FALSIFY: Rate-limited withdrawal queue
cards.validWhen: // SECURE: Rate-limited withdrawal queue

check: VERIFY: Severity: HIGH | Sources: Good Entry (Code4rena)

cards.title: Pattern 5: Parameter Ordering in Fee Collection
cards.detect: Severity:** HIGH | **Sources:** Superposition (Code4rena)
check: VERIFY: Severity: HIGH | Sources: Superposition (Code4rena)
IMPACT: Complete failure of protocol fee collection, funds locked permanently.

cards.title: Pattern 6: Collect All Fees on First Claim
cards.detect: Severity:** HIGH | **Sources:** Vultisig (Code4rena)
check: VERIFY: Severity: HIGH | Sources: Vultisig (Code4rena)
IMPACT: Subsequent claimers find no fees remaining, transactions revert.
cards.impact: Subsequent claimers find no fees remaining, transactions revert.

cards.detect: Severity:** HIGH | **Sources:** Particle Protocol (Cantina)
check: VERIFY: Severity: HIGH | Sources: Particle Protocol (Cantina)

check: VERIFY: Severity: MEDIUM | Sources: Serum v4 (OtterSec)

cards.title: Pattern 9: Fees Not Segregated from Principal
cards.detect: Severity:** HIGH | **Sources:** GFX Labs (Sherlock)
check: VERIFY: Severity: HIGH | Sources: GFX Labs (Sherlock)
IMPACT: User's swapped WETH sent to owner, unrecoverable.
cards.impact: User's swapped WETH sent to owner, unrecoverable.

cards.title: Pattern 10: Double Fee Points Update
cards.detect: Severity:** HIGH | **Sources:** Gainsnetwork (Pashov)
check: VERIFY: Severity: HIGH | Sources: Gainsnetwork (Pashov)
IMPACT: Users get fee discounts twice as fast, protocol loses fee revenue.
cards.impact: Users get fee discounts twice as fast, protocol loses fee revenue.

cards.title: Pattern 11: Subtree Borrow Not Propagated (Fee Underpayment)
cards.detect: Severity:** HIGH | **Sources:** Ammplify (Sherlock)
check: VERIFY: Severity: HIGH | Sources: Ammplify (Sherlock)
IMPACT: Takers pay up to 99% less fees, makers lose expected revenue.
cards.impact: Takers pay up to 99% less fees, makers lose expected revenue.

cards.title: Secure Pattern 3: Proportional Fee Collection
cards.detect: function claim(uint256 tokenId) external returns (uint256 amount0, uint256 amount1) {
check: VERIFY: function claim(uint256 tokenId) external returns (uint256 amount0, uint256 amount1) {
FALSIFY: Secure Pattern 3: Proportional Fee Collection
cards.validWhen: function claim(uint256 tokenId) external returns (uint256 amount0, uint256 amount1) {

cards.title: Pattern 1: Overestimation of Available Liquidity in Compound/Rebalance (HIGH)
cards.detect: Calculating theoretical liquidity amounts that exceed actual available liquidity causes transaction reverts and DoS.
check: VERIFY: Calculating theoretical liquidity amounts that exceed actual available liquidity causes transaction reverts and DoS.
PROVE: Overestimating liquidity from multiple ranges
cards.antipattern: Overestimating liquidity from multiple ranges
cards.validWhen: Calculating theoretical liquidity amounts that exceed actual available liquidity causes transaction reverts and DoS.

cards.title: Pattern 2: Wrong Inequality at Price Range Boundary (HIGH)
cards.detect: Using strict inequality `<` instead of `<=` when checking if current price is at position boundary causes incorrect...
check: VERIFY: Using strict inequality < instead of <= when checking if current price is at position boundary causes incorrect...
PROVE: Strict inequality excludes boundary condition
FALSIFY: Include boundary with <=
cards.antipattern: Strict inequality excludes boundary condition
cards.validWhen: Using strict inequality < instead of <= when checking if current price is at position boundary causes incorrect...

cards.title: Pattern 3: Incorrect Active Liquidity at Tick Boundaries (HIGH)
cards.detect: Skipping liquidity delta when current tick is exactly at range boundary causes underflow or incorrect reward...
check: VERIFY: Skipping liquidity delta when current tick is exactly at range boundary causes underflow or incorrect reward...
PROVE: Tick iteration skips boundary tick
FALSIFY: Perform net liquidity decrement before iteration
cards.antipattern: Tick iteration skips boundary tick
cards.securePattern: Perform net liquidity decrement before iteration
cards.validWhen: Skipping liquidity delta when current tick is exactly at range boundary causes underflow or incorrect reward...
cards.invalidWhen: Perform net liquidity decrement before iteration

cards.title: Pattern 4: Pool Initialization Front-Running (MEDIUM)
cards.detect: Permissionless `initialize()` function allows attackers to set unfair initial price before legitimate deployer.
check: VERIFY: Permissionless initialize() function allows attackers to set unfair initial price before legitimate deployer.
PROVE: No access control on initialize
FALSIFY: Add access control or move to constructor
cards.antipattern: No access control on initialize
cards.securePattern: Add access control or move to constructor
cards.validWhen: Permissionless initialize() function allows attackers to set unfair initial price before legitimate deployer.
cards.invalidWhen: Add access control or move to constructor

cards.title: Pattern 5: Fee Theft via Flash Loan Deposit/Withdraw (HIGH)
cards.detect: Non-reinvested fees can be stolen via flash loan attack when fee accounting doesn't properly scale LP token minting.
check: VERIFY: Non-reinvested fees can be stolen via flash loan attack when fee accounting doesn't properly scale LP token minting.
PROVE: Fee accounting can be bypassed
FALSIFY: Always factor in fee value
cards.antipattern: Fee accounting can be bypassed
cards.validWhen: Non-reinvested fees can be stolen via flash loan attack when fee accounting doesn't properly scale LP token minting.

cards.title: Pattern 6: Shared Pool Liquidity Theft Between Pairs (HIGH)
cards.detect: Multiple pairs using same Uniswap pool with overlapping tick ranges can steal each other's liquidity.
check: VERIFY: Multiple pairs using same Uniswap pool with overlapping tick ranges can steal each other's liquidity.
PROVE: No internal liquidity tracking per pair
FALSIFY: Track liquidity per pair internally
cards.antipattern: No internal liquidity tracking per pair
cards.validWhen: Multiple pairs using same Uniswap pool with overlapping tick ranges can steal each other's liquidity.

cards.title: Pattern 7: Permissionless Fee Withdrawal on Behalf of Pool (HIGH)
cards.detect: Allowing anyone to call `withdrawFees()` for any address including the pool itself enables fee theft.
check: VERIFY: Allowing anyone to call withdrawFees() for any address including the pool itself enables fee theft.
PROVE: Permissionless fee withdrawal for any address
FALSIFY: Prevent fee withdrawal for pool address
cards.antipattern: Permissionless fee withdrawal for any address
cards.securePattern: Prevent fee withdrawal for pool address
cards.validWhen: Allowing anyone to call withdrawFees() for any address including the pool itself enables fee theft.
cards.invalidWhen: Prevent fee withdrawal for pool address

cards.title: Pattern 8: Cached Liquidity Allows Undercollateralized Positions (HIGH)
cards.detect: Caching Uniswap position liquidity at deposit time allows manipulation via ERC777 hooks.
check: VERIFY: Caching Uniswap position liquidity at deposit time allows manipulation via ERC777 hooks.
PROVE: Liquidity cached before transfer completes
FALSIFY: Check liquidity AFTER transfer
cards.antipattern: Liquidity cached before transfer completes
cards.validWhen: Caching Uniswap position liquidity at deposit time allows manipulation via ERC777 hooks.

cards.title: Pattern 9: Recovery Mode Blocking Liquidity Withdrawal (HIGH)
cards.detect: Whitelisting mechanisms that block token transfers prevent legitimate users from withdrawing liquidity.
check: VERIFY: Whitelisting mechanisms that block token transfers prevent legitimate users from withdrawing liquidity.
PROVE: Transfer verification blocks withdrawal
FALSIFY: Two-step withdrawal to whitelisted intermediary
cards.antipattern: Transfer verification blocks withdrawal
cards.validWhen: Whitelisting mechanisms that block token transfers prevent legitimate users from withdrawing liquidity.

cards.title: Secure Pattern 2: Per-Position Liquidity Accounting
cards.detect: // SECURE: Track liquidity per logical position/pair
check: VERIFY: // SECURE: Track liquidity per logical position/pair
FALSIFY: Track liquidity per logical position/pair
cards.validWhen: // SECURE: Track liquidity per logical position/pair

cards.title: Pattern 1: Direct slot0 Usage for Price-Sensitive Operations (HIGH - 12+ reports)
cards.detect: Using `slot0.sqrtPriceX96` directly for swap calculations, liquidity allocations, or collateral valuations exposes...
check: VERIFY: Using slot0.sqrtPriceX96 directly for swap calculations, liquidity allocations, or collateral valuations exposes...
PROVE: Direct slot0 usage in price calculation
cards.antipattern: Direct slot0 usage in price calculation
cards.validWhen: Using slot0.sqrtPriceX96 directly for swap calculations, liquidity allocations, or collateral valuations exposes...

cards.title: Pattern 2: slot0-Based Reallocation/Rebalancing (HIGH - 9+ reports)
cards.detect: Using spot prices to trigger position reallocation or rebalancing allows attackers to force unfavorable reallocations.
check: VERIFY: Using spot prices to trigger position reallocation or rebalancing allows attackers to force unfavorable reallocations.
PROVE: Permissionless reallocation based on spot price
cards.antipattern: Permissionless reallocation based on spot price
cards.validWhen: Using spot prices to trigger position reallocation or rebalancing allows attackers to force unfavorable reallocations.

cards.title: Pattern 3: slot0 Tick for Position Tick Setting (HIGH)
cards.detect: Using the tick from slot0 rather than deriving tick from sqrtPriceX96 causes asymmetric positions at tick boundaries.
check: VERIFY: Using the tick from slot0 rather than deriving tick from sqrtPriceX96 causes asymmetric positions at tick boundaries.
PROVE: Using slot0 tick directly
cards.antipattern: Using slot0 tick directly
cards.validWhen: Using the tick from slot0 rather than deriving tick from sqrtPriceX96 causes asymmetric positions at tick boundaries.

cards.title: Pattern 4: TWAP Observation Cardinality Manipulation (HIGH)
cards.detect: Exploiting uninitialized observations in the Uniswap V3 observation array to corrupt TWAP calculations.
check: VERIFY: Exploiting uninitialized observations in the Uniswap V3 observation array to corrupt TWAP calculations.
PROVE: Not checking if observations are initialized
FALSIFY: Check initialized field
cards.antipattern: Not checking if observations are initialized
cards.validWhen: Exploiting uninitialized observations in the Uniswap V3 observation array to corrupt TWAP calculations.

cards.title: Pattern 5: Negative Tick Delta Rounding Error (HIGH - 19+ reports)
cards.detect: Failing to round down for negative tick deltas when calculating TWAP causes incorrect price.
check: VERIFY: Failing to round down for negative tick deltas when calculating TWAP causes incorrect price.
PROVE: No rounding for negative tick deltas
FALSIFY: Round down for negative deltas (Uniswap OracleLibrary pattern)
cards.antipattern: No rounding for negative tick deltas
cards.securePattern: Round down for negative deltas (Uniswap OracleLibrary pattern)
cards.validWhen: Failing to round down for negative tick deltas when calculating TWAP causes incorrect price.
cards.invalidWhen: Round down for negative deltas (Uniswap OracleLibrary pattern)

cards.title: Pattern 6: Insufficient TWAP Duration (MEDIUM)
cards.detect: Using TWAP windows that are too short (< 30 minutes) makes manipulation economically viable.
check: VERIFY: Using TWAP windows that are too short (< 30 minutes) makes manipulation economically viable.
PROVE: 36-second short TWAP, 5-minute long TWAP
cards.antipattern: 36-second short TWAP, 5-minute long TWAP
cards.validWhen: Using TWAP windows that are too short (< 30 minutes) makes manipulation economically viable.

cards.title: Pattern 7: Reserve-Based Oracle Pricing (HIGH)
cards.detect: Using pool reserves directly for LP token pricing instead of manipulation-resistant sources.
check: VERIFY: Using pool reserves directly for LP token pricing instead of manipulation-resistant sources.
PROVE: Using manipulable reserves for pricing
cards.antipattern: Using manipulable reserves for pricing
cards.validWhen: Using pool reserves directly for LP token pricing instead of manipulation-resistant sources.

cards.title: Pattern 8: Decimal Mismatch in sqrtPriceX96 Calculation (HIGH)
cards.detect: Hardcoding decimal divisors instead of dynamically calculating based on token decimals.
check: VERIFY: Hardcoding decimal divisors instead of dynamically calculating based on token decimals.
PROVE: Hardcoded 1e9 divisor ignores decimal differences
cards.antipattern: Hardcoded 1e9 divisor ignores decimal differences
cards.validWhen: Hardcoding decimal divisors instead of dynamically calculating based on token decimals.

cards.title: Pattern 9: Spot Price in Factory/Deployment (MEDIUM)
cards.detect: Using spot prices during pool deployment for initial liquidity calculations.
check: VERIFY: Using spot prices during pool deployment for initial liquidity calculations.
PROVE: Spot price for deployment liquidity calculation
cards.antipattern: Spot price for deployment liquidity calculation
cards.validWhen: Using spot prices during pool deployment for initial liquidity calculations.

cards.title: Pattern 10: Hook/Callback Price Manipulation (HIGH)
cards.detect: Using current prices in swap hooks/callbacks for fee distribution or other calculations.
check: VERIFY: Using current prices in swap hooks/callbacks for fee distribution or other calculations.
PROVE: Hook uses current price for fee swap
cards.antipattern: Hook uses current price for fee swap
cards.validWhen: Using current prices in swap hooks/callbacks for fee distribution or other calculations.

check: VERIFY: // SECURE: Use TWAP with adequate duration and validation
FALSIFY: Use TWAP with adequate duration and validation

cards.title: Vulnerability Description
cards.detect: This vulnerability exists because **swap operations set amountOutMinimum to 0 or use ineffective slippage...
check: VERIFY: swap operations set amountOutMinimum to 0 or use ineffective slippage calculations when calling Uniswap V3/V4 functions, allowing 100%...
PROVE: *Scenario 1: Classic Sandwich Attack (Most Common - 43/43 reports); Alice submits a swap transaction with inadequate slippage protection (amountOutMinimum: 0)
ANTIPATTERN: deadline set to max uint256 effectively disables protection
cards.antipattern: deadline set to max uint256 effectively disables protection
cards.validWhen: This vulnerability exists because swap operations set amountOutMinimum to 0 or use ineffective slippage calculations when calling Uniswap V3/V4 functions, allowing 100%...

cards.detect: Uniswap V4's `notifyUnsubscribe` has gas limits to protect against malicious subscribers, but underestimation allows...
check: VERIFY: Uniswap V4's notifyUnsubscribe has gas limits to protect against malicious subscribers, but underestimation allows...

cards.title: Pattern 3: Hook Callback Fee Farming via Self-Triggered Backrun (HIGH)
cards.detect: Hook callbacks that auto-execute trades based on price thresholds can be exploited by LPs to farm fees.
check: VERIFY: Hook callbacks that auto-execute trades based on price thresholds can be exploited by LPs to farm fees.
PROVE: Auto back-run when price hits threshold
FALSIFY: Add rate limiting or require external trigger
cards.antipattern: Auto back-run when price hits threshold
cards.securePattern: Add rate limiting or require external trigger
cards.validWhen: Hook callbacks that auto-execute trades based on price thresholds can be exploited by LPs to farm fees.
cards.invalidWhen: Add rate limiting or require external trigger

cards.title: Pattern 4: Fee-on-Transfer Token Incompatibility (MEDIUM)
cards.detect: AMMs that assume `balanceAfter - balanceBefore == transferAmount` break with fee-on-transfer tokens.
check: VERIFY: AMMs that assume balanceAfter - balanceBefore == transferAmount break with fee-on-transfer tokens.
PROVE: Assumes transfer amount equals received amount
FALSIFY: Use actual received amount
cards.antipattern: Assumes transfer amount equals received amount
cards.validWhen: AMMs that assume balanceAfter - balanceBefore == transferAmount break with fee-on-transfer tokens.

cards.title: Pattern 5: Non-Standard ERC20 Return Value Handling (MEDIUM)
cards.detect: Tokens like USDT and BNB don't return `bool` on transfer, causing reverts with standard interfaces.
check: VERIFY: Tokens like USDT and BNB don't return bool on transfer, causing reverts with standard interfaces.
PROVE: Expects bool return value
FALSIFY: Use SafeERC20 or TransferHelper
cards.antipattern: Expects bool return value
cards.validWhen: Tokens like USDT and BNB don't return bool on transfer, causing reverts with standard interfaces.

cards.title: Pattern 6: Hook Collision in Token Accounting (MEDIUM)
cards.detect: When Bunni pools use Bunni tokens as underlying assets, hook callbacks can corrupt accounting due to balance collisions.
check: VERIFY: When Bunni pools use Bunni tokens as underlying assets, hook callbacks can corrupt accounting due to balance collisions.
PROVE: Balance check doesn't account for am-AMM bid during callback
FALSIFY: Track am-AMM separately or exclude Bunni token pools
cards.antipattern: Balance check doesn't account for am-AMM bid during callback
cards.securePattern: Track am-AMM separately or exclude Bunni token pools
cards.validWhen: When Bunni pools use Bunni tokens as underlying assets, hook callbacks can corrupt accounting due to balance collisions.
cards.invalidWhen: Track am-AMM separately or exclude Bunni token pools

cards.title: Pattern 7: Uniswap V4 Wrapper Position Fee Theft (HIGH)
cards.detect: Partial unwrap of V4 positions doesn't decrement `tokensOwed` state, enabling repeated fee theft.
check: VERIFY: Partial unwrap of V4 positions doesn't decrement tokensOwed state, enabling repeated fee theft.
PROVE: tokensOwed never decremented after partial unwrap
FALSIFY: Decrement tokensOwed after distribution
cards.antipattern: tokensOwed never decremented after partial unwrap
cards.validWhen: Partial unwrap of V4 positions doesn't decrement tokensOwed state, enabling repeated fee theft.

cards.title: Pattern 8: Reentrancy via Yield Strategy Trade Path (CRITICAL)
cards.detect: External swap paths in yield strategies allow reentrancy through malicious tokens.
check: VERIFY: External swap paths in yield strategies allow reentrancy through malicious tokens.
PROVE: External swap during redemption allows reentrancy
FALSIFY: Add reentrancy guard to all entry points
cards.antipattern: External swap during redemption allows reentrancy
cards.securePattern: Add reentrancy guard to all entry points
cards.validWhen: External swap paths in yield strategies allow reentrancy through malicious tokens.
cards.invalidWhen: Add reentrancy guard to all entry points

cards.title: Pattern 9: Dynamic LDF Tick Bound Overflow (MEDIUM)
cards.detect: Dynamic Liquidity Distribution Functions (LDFs) can have tick bounds overflow after shift operations.
check: VERIFY: Dynamic Liquidity Distribution Functions (LDFs) can have tick bounds overflow after shift operations.
PROVE: tickUpper not validated after shift
FALSIFY: Cap tickUpper after shift
cards.antipattern: tickUpper not validated after shift
cards.validWhen: Dynamic Liquidity Distribution Functions (LDFs) can have tick bounds overflow after shift operations.

cards.title: Pattern 10: am-AMM Manager Verification Bypass (MEDIUM)
cards.detect: Not checking if am-AMM is disabled allows stale managers to fulfill orders.
check: VERIFY: Not checking if am-AMM is disabled allows stale managers to fulfill orders.
PROVE: Doesn't check if am-AMM is disabled
FALSIFY: Check am-AMM enabled status
cards.antipattern: Doesn't check if am-AMM is disabled
cards.validWhen: Not checking if am-AMM is disabled allows stale managers to fulfill orders.

cards.title: Secure Pattern 2: Robust Token Transfer Handling
cards.detect: // SECURE: Handle all ERC20 edge cases
check: VERIFY: // SECURE: Handle all ERC20 edge cases
FALSIFY: Handle all ERC20 edge cases
cards.validWhen: // SECURE: Handle all ERC20 edge cases

cards.title: Secure Pattern 3: Gas-Optimized Hook Callbacks
cards.detect: // SECURE: Minimize gas in critical callbacks
check: VERIFY: // SECURE: Minimize gas in critical callbacks
FALSIFY: Minimize gas in critical callbacks
cards.validWhen: // SECURE: Minimize gas in critical callbacks

cards.title: 1. First Depositor / Inflation Attacks
cards.detect:
LP tokens are calculated as:

```

liquidity = sqrt(amount0 * amount1)                    // First deposit

liquidity =...
check: VERIFY: liquidity = sqrt(amount0 * amount1) // First deposit
PROVE: Attacker creates pool and deposits minimal amount (1 wei of each token); Attacker receives 1 wei of LP tokens: sqrt(1 * 1) = 1
FALSIFY: Enforce minimum initial deposit
IMPACT: Complete loss of deposited funds for victims
cards.antipattern: Unrestricted burn allows pool hijacking
cards.validWhen: liquidity = sqrt(amount0 * amount1) // First deposit
cards.impact: Complete loss of deposited funds for victims

cards.title: 3. Sandwich & MEV Attacks
cards.detect: Withdrawal swaps without protection
check: VERIFY: Withdrawal swaps without protection
PROVE: Users can set exploitable parameters
FALSIFY: Use private transaction submission
cards.antipattern: Users can set exploitable parameters
cards.validWhen: Withdrawal swaps without protection

cards.title: 4. Spot Price Manipulation (slot0)
cards.detect: `slot0` returns the current tick and sqrtPriceX96 which reflect the most recent swap.
check: VERIFY: slot0 returns the current tick and sqrtPriceX96 which reflect the most recent swap.
PROVE: Using slot0 for price calculation
FALSIFY: Time-weighted average price
cards.antipattern: Using slot0 for price calculation
cards.validWhen: slot0 returns the current tick and sqrtPriceX96 which reflect the most recent swap.

cards.title: 5. Deadline Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: No deadline - transaction can execute anytime
check: VERIFY: No deadline - transaction can execute anytime
FALSIFY: User controls execution deadline
cards.antipattern: No deadline - transaction can execute anytime
cards.validWhen: No deadline - transaction can execute anytime

cards.title: 6. Reserve Manipulation Attacks
cards.detect: IL calculation uses manipulatable reserves
check: VERIFY: IL calculation uses manipulatable reserves
FALSIFY: Time-weighted reserves
cards.antipattern: IL calculation uses manipulatable reserves
cards.validWhen: IL calculation uses manipulatable reserves

cards.title: 7. LP Token Calculation Issues
cards.detect: Assumes 18 decimals for all tokens
check: VERIFY: Assumes 18 decimals for all tokens
FALSIFY: Fix: Handle Variable Decimals
cards.antipattern: Assumes 18 decimals for all tokens
cards.validWhen: Assumes 18 decimals for all tokens

cards.title: 8. Callback & Reentrancy Attacks
cards.detect: No access control on callback
check: VERIFY: Uniswap V3 callbacks (uniswapV3MintCallback, uniswapV3SwapCallback) are called by the pool during operations.
PROVE: Swap through untrusted token path
FALSIFY: Only allow whitelisted tokens in path
IMPACT: Fund Drainage: Unrestricted callbacks allow draining approved tokens
cards.antipattern: Swap through untrusted token path
cards.securePattern: Only allow whitelisted tokens in path
cards.validWhen: Uniswap V3 callbacks (uniswapV3MintCallback, uniswapV3SwapCallback) are called by the pool during operations.
cards.invalidWhen: Only allow whitelisted tokens in path
cards.impact: Fund Drainage: Unrestricted callbacks allow draining approved tokens

cards.title: 9. Factory & Pool Creation Attacks
cards.detect: Deterministic token address
check: VERIFY: When using CREATE opcode, new contract addresses are predictable.
PROVE: Hardcoded hash doesn't match actual factory
FALSIFY: Unpredictable address with user-controlled salt
IMPACT: Permanent DoS: Factory permanently blocked from creating pairs
cards.antipattern: Hardcoded hash doesn't match actual factory
cards.validWhen: When using CREATE opcode, new contract addresses are predictable.
cards.impact: Permanent DoS: Factory permanently blocked from creating pairs

cards.title: 10. Decimal & Math Calculation Issues
cards.detect: Assumes both tokens have same decimals
check: VERIFY: Assumes both tokens have same decimals
FALSIFY: Normalize decimals before calculation
cards.antipattern: Assumes both tokens have same decimals
cards.validWhen: Assumes both tokens have same decimals

cards.title: 11. Liquidity Migration & Protocol Upgrade Attacks
cards.detect: Uses raw balanceOf for calculations
check: VERIFY: Uses raw balanceOf for calculations
PROVE: Assumes protocol owns all pool reserves
FALSIFY: Calculate based on actual LP ownership
cards.antipattern: Assumes protocol owns all pool reserves
cards.securePattern: Calculate based on actual LP ownership
cards.validWhen: Uses raw balanceOf for calculations
cards.invalidWhen: Calculate based on actual LP ownership

cards.title: 12. Flash Loan-Based Graduation/Threshold Manipulation
cards.detect: Atomic unwrap allows flash loan closure
check: VERIFY: Atomic unwrap allows flash loan closure
FALSIFY: Enforce delay after graduation
cards.antipattern: Atomic unwrap allows flash loan closure
cards.validWhen: Atomic unwrap allows flash loan closure

cards.title: 13. Detection Patterns & Audit Checklist
cards.detect: Pattern 1: `slot0()` or `getReserves()` used for pricing without TWAP
check: VERIFY: Pattern 1: slot0() or getReserves() used for pricing without TWAP
First depositor attack: Is MINIMUM_LIQUIDITY burned?
Slippage: Is amountOutMin enforced and non-zero?
LOOK FOR: Pattern 1: `slot0()` or `getReserves()` used for pricing without TWAP
cards.validWhen: Pattern 1: slot0() or getReserves() used for pricing without TWAP

cards.title: 13. Imbalanced Liquidity Addition Exploitation
cards.detect: LP token calculation uses the minimum of two ratios:
check: VERIFY: LP token calculation uses the minimum of two ratios
PROVE: No slippage checks on liquidity initialization
FALSIFY: Calculate optimal amounts first
cards.antipattern: No slippage checks on liquidity initialization
cards.validWhen: LP token calculation uses the minimum of two ratios

cards.title: 14. Rebasing Token Integration Issues
cards.detect: When depositing rebasing tokens, the initial balance equals the deposit amount.
check: VERIFY: When depositing rebasing tokens, the initial balance equals the deposit amount.
PROVE: Caching rebasing token shares
FALSIFY: Use wrapper token or track scaled balances
cards.antipattern: Caching rebasing token shares
cards.securePattern: Use wrapper token or track scaled balances
cards.validWhen: When depositing rebasing tokens, the initial balance equals the deposit amount.
cards.invalidWhen: Use wrapper token or track scaled balances

cards.title: 15. Impermanent Loss Protection Abuse
cards.detect: IL protection calculates losses by comparing initial deposit ratios to withdrawal ratios.
check: VERIFY: IL protection calculates losses by comparing initial deposit ratios to withdrawal ratios.
PROVE: IL protection for ALL pairs
FALSIFY: Whitelist tokens eligible for IL protection
cards.antipattern: IL protection for ALL pairs
cards.securePattern: Whitelist tokens eligible for IL protection
cards.validWhen: IL protection calculates losses by comparing initial deposit ratios to withdrawal ratios.
cards.invalidWhen: Whitelist tokens eligible for IL protection

cards.title: 16. Protocol Invariant Breaking
cards.detect: Rounding errors accumulate to break invariant
check: VERIFY: Rounding errors accumulate to break invariant
FALSIFY: Add invariant check after operations
cards.antipattern: Rounding errors accumulate to break invariant
cards.validWhen: Rounding errors accumulate to break invariant

cards.title: 17. DEX Swap Slippage Accounting Discrepancies
cards.detect: Uses expected amount, not actual received
check: VERIFY: Uses expected amount, not actual received
FALSIFY: Track actual swap output
cards.antipattern: Uses expected amount, not actual received
cards.validWhen: Uses expected amount, not actual received

cards.title: 18. Leftover Token Accumulation in Autocompounding
cards.detect: Doesn't consider existing balance before swap
check: VERIFY: Doesn't consider existing balance before swap
FALSIFY: Account for existing balances
cards.antipattern: Doesn't consider existing balance before swap
cards.validWhen: Doesn't consider existing balance before swap

cards.detect: Pool uses ETH but vault holds WETH
check: VERIFY: Pool uses ETH but vault holds WETH
FALSIFY: Handle WETH/ETH conversion
cards.antipattern: Pool uses ETH but vault holds WETH
cards.validWhen: Pool uses ETH but vault holds WETH

cards.title: 20. Single-Sided vs Proportional Exit Confusion
cards.detect: Uses single-sided exit during emergency
check: VERIFY: Uses single-sided exit during emergency
FALSIFY: Use proportional exit for emergencies
cards.antipattern: Uses single-sided exit during emergency
cards.validWhen: Uses single-sided exit during emergency

cards.title: 21. Type Casting & Integer Overflow Issues
cards.detect: When casting from larger integer types to smaller ones without validation:
check: VERIFY: When casting from larger integer types to smaller ones without validation
PROVE: uint8 can only go up to 255
FALSIFY: Use try_from with error handling
cards.antipattern: uint8 can only go up to 255
cards.validWhen: When casting from larger integer types to smaller ones without validation

cards.detect:
Protocol contracts that:

2. Execute swaps without comparing to...

PROVE: Uses spot price for swap amount calculation
FALSIFY: Validate spot price against oracle
cards.antipattern: Uses spot price for swap amount calculation
cards.validWhen: Protocol contracts that

cards.title: 23. LP Token Burn/Hijack Attacks
cards.detect: Public `burn()` function without withdrawal logic
check: VERIFY: Public burn() function without withdrawal logic
PROVE: Unrestricted burn allows totalSupply manipulation
FALSIFY: Burn only through withdrawal with minimum enforced
cards.antipattern: Unrestricted burn allows totalSupply manipulation
cards.securePattern: Burn only through withdrawal with minimum enforced
cards.validWhen: Public burn() function without withdrawal logic
cards.invalidWhen: Burn only through withdrawal with minimum enforced

cards.title: 24. Constant Sum AMM Arbitrage
cards.detect:
Constant sum invariant: `k = a + b`



Unlike x*y=k (constant product), the price doesn't change with reserves.
check: VERIFY: Constant sum invariant: k = a + b
PROVE: Constant sum AMM with 1:1 rate
FALSIFY: Use constant product or stableswap invariant
cards.antipattern: Constant sum AMM with 1:1 rate
cards.securePattern: Use constant product or stableswap invariant
cards.validWhen: Constant sum invariant: k = a + b
cards.invalidWhen: Use constant product or stableswap invariant

cards.title: 25. State Accounting Discrepancies
cards.detect:
State variables are updated incorrectly:

- Subtraction from wrong counter (e.
check: VERIFY: State variables are updated incorrectly
PROVE: Decreases ohmMinted instead of increasing ohmRemoved
FALSIFY: Clear separation of minted vs removed tracking
cards.antipattern: Decreases ohmMinted instead of increasing ohmRemoved
cards.securePattern: Clear separation of minted vs removed tracking
cards.validWhen: State variables are updated incorrectly
cards.invalidWhen: Clear separation of minted vs removed tracking

cards.title: 26. Incorrect Liquidity Ownership Assumptions
cards.detect:
Protocol calculates:

```

lpToRemove = (tokenToRemove * totalLpSupply) / totalReserve

```



But if protocol only owns a fraction of the pool, `lpToRemove` exceeds protocol's LP balance.
check: VERIFY: lpToRemove = (tokenToRemove * totalLpSupply) / totalReserve
PROVE: Uses total pool reserves, not owned portion
FALSIFY: Base calculations on protocol's actual LP holdings
cards.antipattern: Uses total pool reserves, not owned portion
cards.securePattern: Base calculations on protocol's actual LP holdings
cards.validWhen: lpToRemove = (tokenToRemove * totalLpSupply) / totalReserve
cards.invalidWhen: Base calculations on protocol's actual LP holdings

cards.title: 27. Dividend/Reward Gaming
cards.detect:
Dividend calculation uses short-term fee averages:

- Only last N trades (e.
check: VERIFY: Dividend calculation uses short-term fee averages
PROVE: normalAverageFee based on last 20 trades only
FALSIFY: Use time-weighted volume, not individual trade count
cards.antipattern: normalAverageFee based on last 20 trades only
cards.securePattern: Use time-weighted volume, not individual trade count
cards.validWhen: Dividend calculation uses short-term fee averages
cards.invalidWhen: Use time-weighted volume, not individual trade count

FALSIFY: Validate all accounts against expected PDAs
cards.antipattern: No validation on vault_reward_token_b_info
cards.securePattern: Validate all accounts against expected PDAs
cards.validWhen: Solana accounts are passed as parameters; the program must verify
cards.invalidWhen: Validate all accounts against expected PDAs

check: VERIFY: Pattern 1: slot0() or getReserves() used for pricing without TWAP
